title: Python task graph extractor
goal: Create scripts/extract-task-graph.py to ingest/export Sheet or CSV task graph rows into generated/task_graph.raw.json.
inputs: Task Graph v0 sheet or CSV export
verification_gate: Script produces raw JSON rows without dropping columns; malformed rows fail loudly.
rollback_plan: Delete generated raw file; preserve source sheet/CSV.
next_action: Implement extractor against CSV first; Sheet API later.

title: Normalize task graph JSON
goal: Create scripts/normalize-task-graph.py to validate required columns, normalize booleans/lists, enforce task IDs, and emit generated/task_graph.normalized.json + task_graph.index.json.
verification_gate: Fails if any task lacks allowed_paths, blocked_paths, verification_gate, rollback_plan, proof_uri, or execution_cell.
rollback_plan: Keep raw JSON and emit validation error report.

title: Build JSON execution packets
goal: Create scripts/build-execution-packets.py to produce one bounded execution_packets/<TASK_ID>.json file per Ready task.
verification_gate: Each packet includes task_id, paths, cell, verification gate, rollback plan, proof_uri, source_graph_uri, generated_at, packet_schema_version.
rollback_plan: Delete generated packets and rebuild from normalized graph.
next_action: Do not include full doc prose in packets.

title: Validate execution packet
goal: Create scripts/validate-execution-packet.py to verify one packet before any agent consumes it.
verification_gate: A packet is invalid if it lacks scope, verification, rollback, proof, owner, or cell.
rollback_plan: Reject invalid packet; do not mutate workspace.
next_action: Wire into Bun verify if useful, but Python remains required.

title: Merge proof records
goal: Create scripts/merge-proof-records.py to collect proof_records/*.proof.json into proof_records/proof_ledger.jsonl.
verification_gate: Proof ledger is append-only; duplicate task IDs must reconcile by revision or fail.
rollback_plan: Preserve existing proof files; write new ledger revision.

title: Update task graph status from proof
goal: Create scripts/update-task-graph-status.py to update statuses from proof results without changing goals, paths, or gates.
verification_gate: Only status/proof_uri/next_action fields may be updated by this script.

title: Package execution bundle
goal: Create scripts/package-execution-bundle.py to package normalized graph, packets, schemas, examples, and proof ledger into a transferable execution bundle.
verification_gate: Bundle excludes secrets, includes manifest, and validates before packaging.
rollback_plan: Delete dist bundle; source artifacts remain.
next_action: Use for Codex handoff and future reruns.

title: Accurate current state map
goal: Map the current local machine/repo state so ChatGPT can plan from observed reality: directory tree graph, repos on disk, related FlexNetOS/LifeOS folders, Nix/Yazelix surfaces, /usr dependency surfaces, generated artifacts, verification commands, and drift from the intended planning-spine package.
inputs: /home/flexnetos/FlexNetOS; /home/flexnetos; /nix/store metadata; /usr metadata; current git repos; planning-spine-v0 artifacts
target_artifacts: state/current_state_map.md; state/current_state_map.json; state/repo_inventory.json; state/tree_snapshot.txt; state/nix_surface_report.json; state/usr_surface_report.json; proof_records/LPS-019.proof.json
allowed_paths: /home/flexnetos/FlexNetOS/**; /home/flexnetos/** read-only; /nix/store read-only metadata; /usr read-only metadata; state/**; proof_records/**
blocked_paths: secrets/**; private keys; token files; wallet files; credential values; full /nix/store content copy; destructive commands; mutation outside state/** and proof_records/**
verification_gate: State map must be generated from observed filesystem/repo commands, include command log and exclusions, identify all git repos, show current branch/HEAD/dirty state, summarize Nix/Yazelix and /usr surfaces without dumping secrets or huge store contents, and produce machine-readable JSON plus human-readable Markdown.
rollback_plan: Delete generated state files; no workspace mutation beyond state/** and proof_records/**.
next_action: Reconciled into sheet. Next absorb LPS-020/LPS-021/LPS-022 proof surfaces, then resume LPS-012.

title: Repair verification frontdoor
goal: Align the verifier entrypoint with the actual Bun runtime used by the local planning-spine package.
verification_gate: bun run planning-spine:verify passes and records runtime findings.
rollback_plan: Revert verifier entrypoint if validation fails.
next_action: Completed locally per Codex; retained as observed proof surface.

title: Connected MVP bundle verification
goal: Add and verify a connected MVP bundle manifest covering the full v0 chain from intent through artifact.
verification_gate: Verifier confirms the MVP object chain is connected and valid.
rollback_plan: Regenerate bundle/report from schemas and examples if validation fails.
next_action: Completed locally per Codex; retained as observed proof surface.

title: Verifier authority integrity
goal: Make verifier authority explicit and machine-readable so proof is tied to a distinct verifier role and capability chain.
inputs: authority graph; proof records; verifier output
blocked_paths: unbounded authority expansion; outside approved package scope
verification_gate: Verifier authority is distinct from executor authority and passes integrity checks.
rollback_plan: Regenerate authority report from source examples if validation fails.
next_action: Completed locally per Codex; after reconciliation resume LPS-012.

title: GitKB planning-plane adoption
goal: Wire GitKB (git-kb) as the spine planning and issue-authoring plane: init harness (git-kb init claude), MCP server (git-kb mcp), daemon plus index, and the board/ready/assign/context loop so tasks are authored and deterministically selected before execution.
inputs: src/meta/.kb live GitKB store and skills; GitKB Docs 02-16 (Drive folder 1F3f2KcZ)
verification_gate: git-kb doctor passes; board/ready/context return live data; MCP server registers in Claude Code proven by a tool call; no secret values printed.
rollback_plan: Remove adoption artifact; .kb store left read-only and untouched.
next_action: Reference src/meta/.kb skills kb-start/kb-tasks/kb-handoff. Gate: config.toml [user] section present.

title: handoff (hf) execution seam
goal: Wire the one-way GitKB-to-execution seam via handoff: hf task mint --from-kb (ADR-0003) so planning-plane tasks mint execution units, and hf/.handoff carries RUN STATE and NEEDS-HUMAN across cold sessions.
blocked_paths: secrets/**; GitKB store writes from the execution side (one-way seam)
verification_gate: hf task mint --from-kb produces an execution unit traceable to a KB task; the seam stays one-way with no execution-to-KB mutation; proof recorded.
rollback_plan: Delete seam artifact; no KB or handoff history mutation.
next_action: Depends on LPS-023. Preserve the ADR-0003 one-way invariant.

title: rusty-idd IDD/OpenSpec control binary
goal: Adopt rusty-idd (one binary unifying the core IDD control-plane, the OpenSpec spec engine, the task runner, and merge-tools) as the intent-binding and gate surface: spec status gate before implementation, merge-tools verify, next front door, and run/deploy with --check drift gates.
inputs: src/rusty-idd crates core/spec/runner/tui/merge-tools/cli; rusty-idd CLAUDE.md workflow; ADR-0010/0015/0017
blocked_paths: secrets/**; resurrecting the retired idd-merge-idd loop
verification_gate: cargo build/test/fmt/clippy plus cargo audit plus rusty-idd merge-tools verify green; rusty-idd spec status runs; render and deploy --check drift gates pass.
rollback_plan: Revert control artifact; rusty-idd repo unchanged.
next_action: Chain parent LPS-024; real dependency is LPS-023 plus a clean repo build. Bind the goal via OpenSpec before implementation.

title: meta git fleet branch/PR surface
goal: Wire meta_git_cli as the fleet multi-repo git surface: cut feature branches from origin/main across peer repos and drive branch, commit, push, PR, checks, merge, and fast-forward main.
blocked_paths: secrets/**; force-push or rebase of long-lived branches
verification_gate: meta git cuts a branch from origin/main and opens a PR to develop with checks; no long-lived-branch force-push or rebase; superset upgrade-only respected.
rollback_plan: Close and abandon the test branch and PR; no long-lived branch mutation.
next_action: Honors git-topology: PRs target develop; develop to main is fast-forward only.

title: meta exec multi-repo run/release
goal: Wire meta_cli exec and release orchestration (meta exec -- verify/status; release-please plus repository_dispatch cross-repo) to drive multi-repo runs and install-via-profile proof.
verification_gate: meta exec -- verify/status runs across two or more peer repos; release-please dry-run produces expected tags; install-via-profile proven from nix-profile paths.
rollback_plan: Revert exec surface artifact; no release tags pushed in dry-run.
next_action: Depends on LPS-026. meta-mcp registration of 28 tools tracked here.

title: Fleet loop spine wiring and inventory closure
goal: Wire the promoted planes into the task-graph pipeline: execution-templates seed the framework graph; beads (br) registered as an alternate tracker to GitKB; prompt_hub front-door intake boundary (ADR-0007) recorded; close the ART-inventory-only GAP for gitkb, hf, meta, beads, and prompt_hub with real step linkage.
inputs: execution-templates; src/beads_rust; src/rusty-idd/imports/prompt_hub; ADR-0007; LPS-023 through LPS-027
verification_gate: Each promoted plane LPS-023 through LPS-027 resolves to a task-graph row with a proof_uri; execution-templates seed verified; beads and prompt_hub linkage recorded as steps not inventory; planning-spine:verify green.
rollback_plan: Revert wiring artifact; promoted rows remain Draft.
next_action: Depends on LPS-023 through LPS-027. Bump the chain to Ready after the envctl parallel session clears.
